w:r.w:t: are the benefits and risks of participating
Results from previous and ongoing trials indicate that
This trial may help in developing newer treatment options for the people affected with
There might be medical problems with
that are not yet known or have not been predicted. Participants will be closely monitored by the
doctors for any such medical problems that may happen during the study.
After this clinical trial is completed and the final report is published, the results will be made available in clear, easy-to-understand language, to both the trial participants and the public
Please understand that, to protect confidential information, not everything can be shown or explained in full detail in this document.
Novartis is a global healthcare company based in Switzerland that provides solutions to address the evolving needs of patients worldwide.
